use_cases: Creating animated visual effects in React Three Fiber applications
Adding retro/vintage shader aesthetics to web experiences
Implementing custom GLSL fragment and vertex shaders with noise-based animations
Building interactive 3D graphics with time-based shader uniforms
Developing generative art and visual effect components for creative projects
ai_summary: A React Three Fiber WebGL shader component that creates animated visual effects using custom GLSL fragment and vertex shaders. Features time-based animations with noise functions (fbm, smoothNoise) and color interpolation between defined gradients. Uses shaderMaterial from drei, extends THREE materials, and implements useFrame for smooth per-frame updates. Designed for creating immersive 3D graphics and retro television-style visual effects in web applications.
